decision_commentary: Executive plans reflect the redesigned 160 sqm no-pool program. 6 plan set components present: architectural plans (revised 160 sqm), structural plans (pool removed, slab on grade), MEP coordination drawings (pool systems removed), site plan (revised without pool), door/window schedule, and finish schedule. engineering_integration_confirmed = true; conflicts_resolved = true; client_signoff_milestone = M3.
